# minimidio upstream

- Repository: https://github.com/octetta/minimidio
- Revision: `0d1f33a24ca1aa9b8d22727e42cdda057570992a`
- Imported: 2026-07-16
- Files: `minimidio.h`, `LICENSE`
- Local changes: none

To update, copy `minimidio.h` and `LICENSE` from a reviewed upstream revision,
update the revision above, and run the native and WebAssembly MIDI builds.
